theme_and_archetype.theme: Hybrid (Dark Mode for Landing/Main, Light Mode for Dashboard)
theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with Neon High-Contrast Tech

principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine high-end automotive brochure aesthetics with modern SaaS precision.
Emotion First: The landing page must feel cinematic and fast; the dashboard must feel clear, analytical, and reliable.
Negative Space: Use massive padding (p-12, p-24) on the landing page to let the cars breathe.
Contrast: Deep space-blue backgrounds against bright neon cyan/orange accents for striking visual tension.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with Bento Grids

grids.landing_page: Tetris Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetrical spans (e.g., col-span-8, col-span-4).
grids.dashboard: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense, structured, strict alignment.

spacing_and_layout.containers: Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for major sections, rounded-xl for standard cards. Always add internal padding (p-6 to p-8) if a container has a border.

surface_strategies.landing_nav: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border-b border-white/10. Sticky top.
surface_strategies.landing_cards: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-lg bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:border-cyan-500/50 transition-colors shadow-2xl.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Neumorphism / Clean Flat: bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow rounded-xl.
surface_strategies.search_bar_floating: Highly blurred glass container (backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/50 border border-white/20) floating over the hero section.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and cards should lift slightly (-translate-y-1). Dark cards border shifts to cyan. Dashboard cards gain stronger drop shadow.
motion_and_interactions.button_primary: Gradient background (Cyan to Blue), text-white, on hover increase brightness and add cyan drop-shadow (drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(6,182,212,0.5)]).
motion_and_interactions.voice_search_btn: Electric Orange circular button with continuous pulsing ring animation (ping).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide-up on enter.

hero_car_dark.description: Futuristic electric SUV, dark cinematic lighting, neon edge highlights. Use for the main Landing Page Hero overlay.

abstract_glass_bg.description: Abstract dark background with cyan/orange leaks. Use as the absolute background layer for the dark landing page to create depth.

car_light_studio.description: Minimalist electric sports car in bright white studio. Use for the Light Theme Dashboard, or the Light Theme Car Detail page.

detail_wheel_accent.description: Close up of modern wheel with neon orange brakes. Great for the 'Specs' or 'Features' section.

red_sports_car_front.description: Aggressive red sports car front in the dark. Perfect for car listing grids as a thumbnail.

landing_page.structure: Hero section with 'abstract_glass_bg' and 'hero_car_dark' overlapping. Floating search bar with budget slider, fuel select, and glowing voice mic. Following sections use Tetris Grid for featured models.

car_listing.structure: Sidebar on the left for filters (budget, brand, fuel). Right side is a dense, highly visual grid of cars using glassmorphism cards.

car_detail.structure: Transition to Light theme. Immersive image gallery on top. Tabs for Specifications, EMI Calculator (custom highly styled widget), and Price Prediction Graph (Recharts). Include a 3D-like viewer section if possible (or high-res 'car_light_studio' image with dimension overlays).

compare_page.structure: Clean, analytical side-by-side table. Use Recharts Radar Chart at the top to visually compare performance, comfort, efficiency, etc.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar (open/close) on left. White background, gray borders. Minimalist. Display saved cars as clean cards, recommendation history in a dense table, and user analytics with Recharts.

components.charts: Use Recharts. For the dark theme, axis strokes should be #4B5563, and lines/bars should use #06b6d4 and #3b82f6. For the light theme, use #9CA3AF for axis.
components.shadcn: For Dashboard: Heavily rely on Shadcn UI (Tables, Select, Tabs, Dialogs, Cards). Override border-radius to match brand (rounded-xl).
components.forms: Inputs should have focus states: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cyan-500 focus:border-cyan-500. On dark mode, bg-white/5 border-white/10.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a Hybrid App. Create a mechanism (like a layout wrapper) that forces `dark` class on the Landing Page and Car Listings, and removes it for the Dashboard and Car Details.
Ensure all `.js` or `.jsx` files are used. DO NOT USE `.tsx` or TypeScript.
Always use the provided exact media URLs. DO NOT USE placeholder images like via.placeholder.com.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements, buttons, inputs, tabs, and form submissions.
Implement Recharts for the EMI graph, Price Prediction Graph, and Compare Radar Chart.
For the Landing page floating search, make the Voice Search button visually pop with an orange ring to invite interaction.
The Hero Image must not have a flat black overlay; use a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/40 to-transparent) so the car and abstract background are fully visible.
